name: Thunder Crook Gaming Case
highlights: Budget-Friendly : Designed to offer great value without compromising on essential features.
M-ATX Motherboard Support : Compatible with Micro-ATX motherboards, ideal for compact builds.
Pre-installed RGB Fan : Comes with a 120mm RGB fan at the rear for effective cooling and added aesthetics.
Half Front Mesh Design : Enhances airflow while adding a modern look with an integrated RGB strip.
Additional Cooling Options : Supports additional fans at the front and top for enhanced cooling performance.
